channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's NATO pressure campaign continues as summit begins
item.description: President Trump's arrival in Ankara kicks off another potentially tense meeting for NATO.

item.title: Heirs of 'odious' 167-year-old Supreme Court ruling see modern parallels
item.description: Descendants of Dred Scott and Chief Justice Roger Taney spoke about reconciliation at a church in the shadow of the Supreme Court last week as the hig...

item.title: Graham Platner urged to withdraw from Maine Senate race after sexual assault claim
item.description: Graham Platner faces mounting calls to drop his U.S. Senate bid in Maine following a Politico report of a sexual assault allegation.

item.title: Climate change damages roads and highways, raising costly repair concerns
item.description: Increasingly frequent and intense heat waves due to climate change are taking a toll on roads, raising questions about infrastructure readiness.
